name: Sesame Water Crackers
recipeIngredient: 1 Egg white blended with 2 tablespoons water
recipeInstructions:
These crackers are excellent served with salad, soup, cheese or spreads.
Makes about 4 dozen
Preheat oven to 400°F. Lightly grease two 14x17-inch baking sheets. Combine flour, baking powder and salt in a large bowl. Stir in warm water and vegetable oil, mixing until smooth dough forms. Halve the dough. Flatten one piece into a large square directly on one prepared sheet. Cut into 3/4 x 3 1/4 inch pieces, leaving in place on the baking sheet. Pierce all over with a fork. Brush generously with egg white mixture. Sprinkle with half of sesame seed. Repeat with remaining half of dough. Bake until crackers are dry and golden, 10 to 12 minutes. Recut if necessary. Cool on racks. Store crackers in an airtight container.
Bon Appetit
